meaning: 阿斯马拉[埃塞俄比亚北部城市]
examples: We flew on Nasair, a regional airline, to Asmara.
There’s almost no crime. Asmara is known as one of the safest cities in Africa.
The minute we landed at Asmara International, I was struck by how bright the light was.
Reports from Eritrea say a group of soldiers have surrounded the ministry of information building in the capital, Asmara.
But when the shells began to burst, he was deported from Asmara, Eritrea's capital, on the ground that his father was Ethiopian.
